mapper.insert: INSERT INTO alert_message (msg_type, content, status, operator, leader, ext_info, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{msgType}, #{content}, #{status}, #{operator}, #{leader}, #{extInfo}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM alert_message ORDER BY update_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO alert_handle (alert_id, handle_result, handler, create_time) VALUES (#{alertId}, #{handleResult}, #{handler}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM alert_handle WHERE alert_id = #{alertId} ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT a.* FROM alert_message a INNER JOIN ( SELECT ext_info, MAX(update_time) AS latest_time FROM alert_message WHERE status = 0 GROUP BY ext_info ) b ON a.ext_info = b.ext_info AND a.update_time = b.latest_time ORDER BY a.update_time DESC
